name: CotivitiIdsStndExtrPMbrHedisMesrtYrMoLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT MBR_HEDIS_MESR_YR_MO_SK, RVW_SET_NM AS HEDIS_RVW_SET_NM, POP_NM AS HEDIS_POP_NM, MESR_NM AS HEDIS_MESR_NM, SUB_MESR_NM AS HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, MBR_ID, MBR_BUCKET_ID AS HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, BASE_EVT_EPSD_DT_SK, ACTVTY_YR_NO, ACTVTY_MO_NO, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_CotivitiIdsStndExtrPMbrHedisMesrtYrMoLoad) SELECT MBR_HEDIS_MESR_YR_MO_SK, HEDIS_RVW_SET_NM, HEDIS_POP_NM, HEDIS_MESR_NM, HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, MBR_ID, HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, BASE_EVT_EPSD_DT_SK, ACTVTY_YR_NO, ACTVTY_MO_NO, SRC_SYS_CD FROM cte WHERE (MBR_UNIQ_KEY IS NULL OR MBR_UNIQ_KEY=0 OR MBR_SK IS NULL OR MBR_SK=0)

Description:
Process Description: This Job Loads Data into IDS P_MBR_HEDIS_MESR_YR_MO table                  

           
PROCESSING:
Build primary key for  PROD_QHP table load data 

Called By: CotivitiIdsStndExtrMbrHedisMesrYrMoSeq
